item.title: 西班牙世界杯英雄戴上“让西班牙再次伟大”帽子
“与生俱来的参议员身份”？ - 格雷厄姆的姐姐宣布在梅斯选择退出时争取完整任期
PJM 最近四次容量拍卖成本中 46% 是由数据中心承担的
中央情报局因媒体泄露与特朗普的伊朗战争保持距离
美国司法部调查哈佛大学与中国来源有关的经济援助计划
item.description:
司法部调查哈佛大学与中国来源相关的经济援助计划 作者：Aldgra Fredly来自大纪元， 美国司法部 (DOJ) 7 月 20 日表示，它正在调查哈佛大学将美国学生排除在由中国资助的经济援助计划之外是否违反了第六章。 哈佛大学，马萨诸塞州剑桥市，2025 年 7 月 4 日。刘学员/The Epoch时间 司法部宣布，哈佛大学的外国资助披露引发了对其是否遵守《民权法案》第六章的担忧，该法案禁止基于国籍的歧视。 联邦法律要求大学报告一年内来自外国的礼物和合同超过 25 万美元。该部门表示，哈佛大学披露了近 45 亿美元的外国资金，其中 6.3 亿美元来自中国，这是该校最大的外国资金来源。 据司法部称，哈佛大学似乎接受来自中国的资金，这些资金要求该大学建立经济援助计划“优先考虑来自特定国家的学生。” “学校不能拿走联邦资金，然后转而接受来自外国的资金来提供故意排除美国公民的经济援助 - 这样做是非法的，我们将在发现任何地方阻止这种行为，”司法部民权部门助理总检察长哈米特·K·迪隆 (Harmeet K. Dhillon) 在声明中表示。 该部门表示，已通过通知函向哈佛大学通报了其合规审查情况，但强调尚未就调查得出任何结论。 迪隆在信中表示，调查将重点关注哈佛学生援助和福利中“可能存在的国籍歧视”，这些歧视是由于“哈佛从外国资助来源获得的助学金和礼物受到限制”而产生的。 哈佛大学在给新闻媒体的一份声明中表示，它正在审查司法部的通知。 “哈佛大学遵守捐赠报告要求的法律，并且根据第六章规定的法律义务，在分配经济援助时不会基于种族、族裔或国籍进行非法歧视，”该大学表示。 中国驻华盛顿大使馆表示，两国教育合作是互利共赢的。 常春藤盟校一直处于更广泛的联邦努力的中心，以执行第六章下的反歧视法。去年，联邦官员对《哈佛法律评论》在其期刊会员资格和文章选择过程中采用“基于种族的标准”的报道展开了调查。 三月份，教育部对哈佛大学发起了两项调查，一项是为了确定该大学是否在招生过程中使用基于种族的偏好，另一项是为了调查校园内持续存在反犹太骚扰的指控。加沙战争。 哈佛大学公开了针对反犹太主义和反穆斯林事件的内部审查，并表示在努力培育包容性校园的同时遵守联邦民权法。 金伯利·哈耶克 (Kimberly Hayek) 和美联社为本报告做出了贡献。
泰勒·德登 星期二，2026 年 7 月 21 日 - 21:45

item.title: Oklo 和 X-Energy 加入联邦核能项目 2 亿美元推动人工智能：彭博社
item.description:
Oklo 和 X-Energy 加入 2 亿美元的联邦核推动人工智能项目：彭博社 彭博社报道反应堆开发商Oklo 和 X-energy 正在加入特朗普政府主导的一项耗资 2 亿美元的计划，该计划旨在加速人工智能数据中心的新建核电站。
详细信息可能会在周三的能源部人工智能能源峰会上公布。根据彭博社看到的一份文件，微软和 Nvidia 也参与了之前宣布的计划，而美国能源部的几个国家实验室和德克萨斯大学奥斯汀分校将在三年内分享 6000 万美元。 “最新举措的目标之一是大幅减少设计、许可和建造新工厂所需的时间，以及减少运营这些工厂所需的员工数量” X-energy 盘后涨幅高达 12%，而 Oklo 涨幅高达 9.9%。
据报道，该计划的目标是大幅减少设计、许可、建造和运营反应堆所需的时间和劳动力。它将加入快速扩张的联邦核支持体系：
西屋电气舰队计划：新建 AP1000 反应堆的项目总价值至少 800 亿美元，由政府安排融资并促进审批。
美日合作伙伴关系：日本支持的田纳西州和阿拉巴马州 GE Vernova Hitachi BWRX-300 项目投资高达 400 亿美元。
第三代+ SMR：8亿美元的成本分摊能源部拨款，由 TVA 的 BWRX-300 项目和 Holtec 的 SMR-300 项目分配。
反应堆试点计划：针对 11 个初始项目的快速能源部授权途径，开发商负责项目成本。
先进反应堆示范计划：联邦成本分摊承诺约为 TerraPower 的 Natrium 和 X-energy 的 Xe-100 示范费用。
与那些资本密集型项目相比，这项新的 2 亿美元项目似乎针对的是不同的瓶颈：可能利用人工智能、联邦实验室和行业合作伙伴来压缩反应堆设计和高耗电数据中心之间的文书工作和工程时间表。
泰勒·德登 星期二，2026 年 7 月 21 日 - 21:20

item.title: 尽管豁免已过期，印度仍以接近创纪录的速度购买俄罗斯石油
item.description:
尽管豁免已过期，印度仍以接近创纪录的速度购买俄罗斯石油 作者作者：Tsvetana Paraskova，来自 OilPrice.com， 尽管美国上个月终止了豁免，但印度 7 月份的原油进口量仍接近历史最高水平。
正当美国和伊朗签署谅解备忘录以继续就协议进行谈判时，美国悄悄让允许购买油轮上装载的俄罗斯石油的豁免于 6 月 17 日到期。 然而，7月份印度进口的俄罗斯原油仍在继续流动，其中许多可能是在美国豁免期间安排的货物。 根据 印度媒体。 7 月份从俄罗斯的进口量与 6 月份 264 万桶/日的历史最高水平相差不远，当时受美国豁免政策自 3 月份以来多次延长一个月的鼓励，印度增加了从俄罗斯的采购量。 伊朗战争和霍尔木兹危机进一步巩固了俄罗斯作为印度最大原油供应国的地位 根据 Kpler 数据，7 月份到目前为止，阿拉伯联合酋长国 (UAE) 排名第二，平均供应 617,000 桶/日，而沙特阿拉伯是印度第三大供应国，7 月初供应 586,000 桶/日。 阿联酋和沙特阿拉伯有解决办法，可以从霍尔木兹海峡以外的码头运输原油。 沙特阿拉伯已将其大部分货物转移到红海的延布出口港，而阿联酋则依靠通往富查伊拉的管道以及阿曼近海和霍尔木兹海峡以东的阿联酋海上油轮进行船对船转运。 分析师称，展望未来，即使美国不再延长对油轮已装载的俄罗斯原油的豁免，俄罗斯原油仍将是印度石油供应的主要来源。
泰勒·德登 星期二，2026 年 7 月 21 日 - 20:55

item.title: 乌克兰陆军参谋长最新成为泽连斯基危险改组的受害者
州长承认，新泽西州有数千名非公民登记投票
item.description:
Thousands Of Noncitizens Registered To Vote In New Jersey, Governor Admits Authored by Tom Gantert via The Epoch Times, New Jersey Gov. Mikie Sherrill said a software error in the state's Motor Vehicle Commission system resulted in roughly 6,600 people who indicated they were not U.S. citizens being registered to vote between June 2023 and June 2024. New Jersey Democratic gubernatorial candidate, U.S. Rep. Mikie Sherrill (D-N.J.), speaks to 2025 年 11 月 4 日，她在新泽西州蒙特克莱尔投票后接受媒体采访。Eduardo Munoz Alvarez/Getty Images Sherrill said in a statement that the individuals answered "no" when asked on a keypad whether they were U.S. citizens while applying for driver's licenses or identification cards, but were registered because of a software error. According to the governor, a preliminary analysis found that fewer than 400 individuals who were newly registered because of the error voted. She said those voters were registered as Democrats, Republicans, and unaffiliated voters and were located throughout the state. 州长表示这个问题发生在上届政府时期。 She said she has directed her chief counsel to investigate what happened and ordered election officials to remove any residents who were erroneously added to the voter rolls during that period. 在新闻发布会上，州长表示该错误已于 2024 年 6 月修复，但她最近才得知。 Sherrill also said the Motor Vehicle Commission administrator she appointed has begun replacing the vendor responsible for administering the system. Sherrill said she was "appalled" by what she described as failures that allowed the error to occur and said those responsible would be held accountable. 她还指责特朗普政府试图“将选举武器化以获取政治利益。” The White House said in an email to The Epoch Times that the New Jersey error highlights the need to pass the SAVE America Act, which Republicans say is necessary to ensure election integrity. "Democrats and their media allies have repeatedly said it is impossible for noncitizens to register to vote, let alone cast a ballot. Time and again, they have been proven wrong," White House Spokeswoman Abigail Jackson stated. "As President [Donald] Trump has said, there is nothing more important than the integrity of our elections. And this latest incident underscores the absolute necessity of the SAVE America Act. American voters deserve to have confidence that our elections are safe and secure - President Trump will never stop fighting to make that happen and all patriotic Americans should join in his effort." 州长表示，该州将继续采取措施，确保只有符合资格的公民才能投票，并计算合法选票。 这是一个重大新闻，将会更新。
泰勒·德登 星期二，2026 年 7 月 21 日 - 20:05

item.title: “我看到死人”：财政部阻止向已故美国人支付 9900 万美元联邦款项
“这他妈是谁？”：乔恩·斯图尔特认为他发现了特朗普的替身
item.description:
“这他妈是谁？”：乔恩·斯图尔特认为他发现了特朗普的替身 Authored by Steve Watson via Modernity News, 乔恩·斯图尔特 (Jon Stewart) 在周一《每日秀》的大部分时间里，在安德鲁斯联合基地的停机坪上发现唐纳德·特朗普总统身后漫步的神秘人物后，确信美国刚刚解锁了总统的秘密备件。
这位深夜喜剧演员已经深入到了他惯用的嘲讽特朗普的套路中，当他把注意力集中在特朗普与记者闲聊的背景中一个长得像总统的人时。 Stewart had been needling Trump for lingering onstage during Spain's trophy celebration after their 1-0 win over Argentina, calling him "Cankles Muldoon" and asking, "What the f*ck are you doing on the stage? It's for the players!"
"那是特朗普的替补吗？！" — Jon Stewart shocked by what is going on in the background during Trump's interview pic.twitter.com/eeici9NQfL — HatsOff (@HatsOffff) 2026 年 7 月 21 日 He then played the clip of Trump telling reporters the tournament was "four times greater than any FIFA ever held," before the president upgraded the claim: "That is probably about five times actually, they're telling me today." Stewart's response: "How do you hold 'a FIFA'? How could our FIFA be four times greater than any other FIFA? ... Is that what they told you? You know, they're telling you that because everyone around you lies to you because you're a little baby." 然后主持人猛踩刹车。 "What's up with the guy behind Trump? Can we see that again? Can you bring that out? Who the fuck is this guy? Who the fuck is this? Is this... What? Who in the world is it? Oh my God! Is that a back-up Trump? Is that - Wait a minute, wait. Hold on a second." He kept going, fully committed: "Wait, what? Wait, Who? What? Is that a back-up Trump or is that Trump? Wait, is the one we've been dealing with back-up Trump or is that Trump?!" 如此相似，斯图尔特的大脑短暂地短路了。 The man walking the tarmac had the same build, the same hair energy, the same general aura of someone who could probably get away with signing an executive order if no one looked too closely. 剧透：这不是替身。这是维克多·克纳夫斯 (Viktor Knavs)，梅拉尼娅·特朗普 (Melania Trump) 82 岁的父亲，也是总统的岳父。 The Slovenian businessman has been a quiet but regular presence around the Trump family for years, and the two men have always shared a certain physical similarity that becomes especially obvious when one of them is casually strolling into frame behind the other.
President Donald Trump and Viktor Knavs, father of First Lady Melania Trump, walk off Marine One on the south lawn of the White House pic.twitter.com/MZmrHu4oxc — FLOTUS 报告 (@MELANIAJTRUMP) 2025 年 5 月 5 日 尽管如此，斯图尔特的“替补特朗普”理论还是太好了，不能完全抛弃。 Given the number of threats and actual assassination attempts this president has already survived, having a ready-made spare on the payroll doesn't sound like the worst idea in the world. 下面是斯图尔特的完整视频：
您的支持对于帮助我们击败大规模审查制度至关重要。 Please consider donating via Locals or check out our unique merch.在 X @ModernityNews 上关注我们。
泰勒·德登 星期二，2026 年 7 月 21 日 - 19:15

item.title: “保卫我们的家园”：FCC采取行动禁止外国军用级无人机进口
item.description:
"Safeguard Our Homeland": FCC Moves To Ban Foreign Military-Grade Drone Imports A little more than a week after we exposed military-grade interceptor drones being openly marketed on Facebook as dual-use technology by a Hong Kong-based company, FCC Chairman Brendan Carr announced a proposal to prohibit the importation and sale of foreign-produced military-grade drones in the U.S. "Today, the FCC took additional action to safeguard our homeland. We have proposed banning the sale of foreign, military-grade drones, including those capable of swarming," Carr wrote on X, adding, "Another step to strengthening and securing America's drone supply chain."
今天，FCC 采取了额外行动来保护我们的家园。 We have proposed banning the sale of foreign, military-grade drones—including those capable of swarming. Another step to strengthening and securing America’s drone supply chain. pic.twitter.com/XZWGSKZF5G — Brendan Carr (@BrendanCarrFCC) July 21, 2026 Carr published a public notice in which the FCC is seeking comments on a proposal to prohibit the continued importation and sale of previously authorized foreign-made military-grade drones and critical components to buyers outside the U.S. government, including systems with swarming capabilities. The notice stated that these dual-use drones "pose an unacceptable risk to the national security of the United States or the security and safety of United States persons"… Our July 13 report, titled "Why Is China Advertising Insane War Drones on Facebook", turned some heads when we showed readers just how easy it was to acquire interceptor drones from China.
我们采访的香港卖家在几分钟内提供了定价表...
Earlier today, Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Gen. Dan Caine warned during a Senate hearing about the dangerous new world in which these low-cost drones are proliferating.
Gen。 John D. Caine warns enemies are gaining dangerous new capabilities through cheap, widely available drone tech. He says the battlefield now stretches from the seabed to space, and America must be ready to fight everywhere at once. 观看 OAN Live 上的 OAN 了解最新动态。 pic.twitter.com/YCdBhcU84i — One America News (@OANN) 2026 年 7 月 21 日 The federal government knows a domestic drone incident involving a threat actor as a question of when, not if. That view is accelerating the race to harden US airspace around military installations, critical infrastructure, mass gatherings and other high-value targets.
泰勒·德登 Tue, 07/21/2026 - 18:50

item.title: 古巴总统警告美国开始打击马克思主义颠覆网络“麦卡锡主义卷土重来”
这个性爱机器人将在学校“教”你的孩子
民主党正在打一场内战，而伯尼·桑德斯是这场战争的始作俑者
